title: UPDATE with correlated subquery causes assertion (or segfault)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE PRIMARY (ID INTEGER NOT NULL, LEN DOUBLE NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID));
CREATE TABLE FOREIGN (ID INTEGER NOT NULL, POS DOUBLE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (ID) REFERENCES PRIMARY (ID));
INSERT INTO PRIMARY (ID, LEN) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, 20.0), (3, NULL);

UPDATE PRIMARY SET LEN = (SELECT AVG(LEN) FROM PRIMARY WHERE ID IN (SELECT ID FROM FOREIGN WHERE POS < (SELECT MAX(LEN) FROM PRIMARY))) WHERE ID IN (SELECT ID FROM FOREIGN WHERE POS < (SELECT MAX(LEN) FROM PRIMARY));
key_bug_features: UPDATE with correlated subquery causes assertion or segfault
